classes.reasoning: This is an Investigational Medicinal Product Accountability Log (titled 'eTMF-004 — INVESTIGATIONAL MEDICINAL PRODUCT ACCOUNTABILITY LOG') tracking IMP receipt, dispensing, and returns at a clinical trial site. It is a regulated TMF document for drug accountability that does not fit the more specific classes like CSP, ICF, CRF, or CSR.

summary: This is an Investigational Medicinal Product (IMP) accountability log for study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001 at site ES-02 (Hospital Universitario La Paz, Madrid). It tracks receipt, dispensing, returns, and inventory balance of BRC-471 (Lumitanib) 100 mg tablets from April through November 2023, maintained by pharmacist Dra. Patricia Ruiz.
content:
# eTMF-004 — INVESTIGATIONAL MEDICINAL PRODUCT ACCOUNTABILITY LOG
## Study: BIORCE-ONC-2023-001
## Site: Hospital Universitario La Paz, Madrid | Site Code: ES-02
## IMP: BRC-471 (Lumitanib) 100 mg tablets
## Pharmacist: Dra. Patricia Ruiz | Period: April–November 2023

| Date | Transaction | Kit Number | Batch | Expiry | Qty Rcvd | Qty Disp | Qty Ret | Balance | Patient | Visit | By |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 10 Apr 2023 | Receipt | KIT-ES02-001 | BRC471-B2303 | 31 Oct 2024 | 120 | — | — | 120 | — | — | P. Ruiz |
| 18 Apr 2023 | Dispensing | KIT-ES02-001 | BRC471-B2303 | 31 Oct 2024 | — | 56 | — | 64 | ES02-001 | C1D1 | P. Ruiz |
| 18 Apr 2023 | Dispensing | KIT-ES02-001 | BRC471-B2303 | 31 Oct 2024 | — | 56 | — | 8 | ES02-002 | C1D1 | P. Ruiz |
| 22 Apr 2023 | Receipt | KIT-ES02-002 | BRC471-B2303 | 31 Oct 2024 | 240 | — | — | 248 | — | — | P. Ruiz |
| 16 May 2023 | Dispensing | KIT-ES02-002 | BRC471-B2303 | 31 Oct 2024 | — | 56 | — | 192 | ES02-001 | C2D1 | P. Ruiz |
| 16 May 2023 | Dispensing | KIT-ES02-002 | BRC471-B2303 | 31 Oct 2024 | — | 56 | — | 136 | ES02-002 | C2D1 | P. Ruiz |
| 16 May 2023 | Return | KIT-ES02-001 | BRC471-B2303 | 31 Oct 2024 | — | — | 4 | 140 | ES02-002 | C1 return | P. Ruiz |
| 14 Jun 2023 | Dispensing | KIT-ES02-002 | BRC471-B2303 | 31 Oct 2024 | — | 42 | — | 98 | ES02-001 | C3D1 (150mg) | P. Ruiz |
| 14 Jun 2023 | Dispensing | KIT-ES02-002 | BRC471-B2303 | 31 Oct 2024 | — | 56 | — | 42 | ES02-003 | C1D1 | P. Ruiz |

**Temperature monitoring:** Min 16°C / Max 27°C. All within 15–30°C range.
**Discrepancies:** None. Running balance reconciled 30 Nov 2023 by Dra. Ruiz.
